display.purpose: Page title only — the 'Aesthetic Training Hub' header.

title.purpose: Trainer names in card headers — the primary scannable element per listing.

body.purpose: Bios, descriptions, filter labels. 65–75ch max line length in reading contexts.

label.purpose: Specialism badges, results counts, secondary metadata.

shadows.name: tier-lift
shadows.purpose: Exclusively for Premium trainer cards, always combined with amber ring. Never applied to Standard cards.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Select content and popover floating surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions (hover, focus, open/close).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, badge color shift — micro-interactions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Dark background, white text, gentle radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), outline-offset 100ms; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action. No background at rest, muted fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Standard Trainer Card
components.description: Default listing card for Standard-tier trainers. Flat, ring-bounded.
components.html:
Sophie ClarkeStandard

Specialist in facial aesthetics and skin health with 6 years of clinical experience.

Anti-WrinkleDermal Fillers

📍 Manchester
components.css: .ds-card-standard { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; background: oklch(1 0 0); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.1); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-name { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); line-height: 1.3; } .ds-badge-standard { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; } .ds-card-bio { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; } .ds-card-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; } .ds-badge-specialism { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; background: transparent; } .ds-card-location { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); margin: 0; }

components.name: Premium Trainer Card
components.description: Premium-tier listing. Two-signal treatment: amber ring + amber surface tint + tier-lift shadow.
components.html:
Dr. Amara Osei⭐ Premium

Aesthetic doctor specialising in natural enhancement. GMC-registered with 10 years experience.

Lip FillerAnti-WrinklePDO Threads

📍 London
components.css: .ds-card-premium { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; background: oklch(0.987 0.022 95.277); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.828 0.189 84.429), 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-name { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); line-height: 1.3; } .ds-badge-premium { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background: oklch(0.828 0.189 84.429); color: oklch(0.414 0.112 45.904); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; } .ds-card-bio { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; } .ds-card-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; } .ds-badge-specialism { font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; background: transparent; } .ds-card-location { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); margin: 0; }

components.name: Specialism Badge
components.description: Outline tag for trainer specialisms. Repeats multiple times per card.
components.css: .ds-badge-specialism-standalone { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; background: transparent; }

components.name: Select Trigger
components.description: Filter dropdown trigger. Compact, outline style. Used in the FilterBar.
components.css: .ds-select-trigger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 6px; height: 32px; min-width: 160px; padding: 0 8px 0 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 100ms, background 100ms; outline: none; } .ds-select-trigger:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-select-trigger:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); outline: 3px solid oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); outline-offset: 0; } .ds-select-value { flex: 1; text-align: left; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-select-icon { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); flex-shrink: 0; pointer-events: none; }

narrative.overview:
This is a gallery that only shows vetted work. A student arriving here is not browsing a generic listing — they are entering a curated professional space where being shown is itself a signal of quality. The design carries that weight: clean, legible, and deliberately undecorated, so the trainers' credentials speak rather than the interface.

The system is built on a grayscale neutral foundation with amber reserved exclusively for the Premium tier — the single colour that earns its place by signalling a real business distinction. Everything else defers. The hierarchy is typographic and positional, not decorative.

The system explicitly rejects the generic job-board aesthetic (clinical gray, zero personality, no curation signal) and the over-luxe beauty-brand aesthetic (dusty rose, heavy serif, candle-brand softness).
keyCharacteristics: Single-typeface system (Inter); weight and size carry the hierarchy
Achromatic neutral palette — amber is the sole exception, reserved for Premium
Flat surfaces with thin rings; elevation only where it means something (the Premium tier)
Cards as the primary affordance — correct for a directory of professional profiles
Two-signal Premium treatment: amber ring + amber surface tint, always together

rules.name: The One Colour Rule
rules.body: Honour Amber is the only saturated colour in the system. It exists exclusively to mark Premium trainer listings. Its rarity is what makes it mean something.

rules.name: The Two-Signal Rule
rules.body: Premium differentiation uses two simultaneous signals: amber ring AND amber surface tint. Apply both together always. Either alone reads as an anomaly, not a tier upgrade.

rules.name: The Weight-First Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is established by font weight (bold → medium → regular), then size, never by colour alone. Do not reach for a new colour to differentiate a text level.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces at rest are flat. Rings communicate structure; shadows communicate elevation. Shadows are reserved for floating surfaces and the Premium tier. Never add box-shadow to a Standard card.

dos: Do use Honour Amber exclusively for Premium tier signals (ring, badge background, card surface tint).
Do apply the two-signal Premium treatment together — amber ring AND amber surface — always.
Do sort Premium trainers above Standard trainers in the listing grid.
Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 as the boundary for Standard cards. Thin rings, not shadows.
Do maintain 4.5:1 contrast minimum for all body text, including Subdued Ink on Pure White.
Do use text-wrap: balance on display headings and text-wrap: pretty on bio/body text.
Do derive filter options dynamically from trainer data — never hardcode specialism or location lists.
donts: Don't make this look like a generic job board — clinical gray, utilitarian, zero curation signal.
Don't tip into over-luxe beauty brand territory — no dusty rose, no heavy script serif.
Don't use medical/clinical aesthetic — cold white, sterile blue, zero warmth.
Don't add shadows to Standard cards. Elevation is a Premium signal.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use Honour Amber outside the Premium tier.
Don't add a second typeface. Inter at different weights is the hierarchy.
Don't let Subdued Ink text appear on any background lighter than Pure White.
